name: mblox
description: mBlox is a lightweight, dependency-free JavaScript library that enables dynamic, Elementor/Gutentor-like content blocks. It can fetch and display content from various sources like **Blogger**, **WordPress**, and any **RSS feed** (including YouTube) in a variety of customizable layouts.

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:icons && npm run build:js
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.cpSync('dist', 'M:/_workspace/dev/m/t/cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mblox/dist', {recursive: true, force: true}); console.log('✅ Deployed to local CDN testing folder');"
scripts.version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let f=fs.readFileSync('mBloxCall.js','utf8'); f=f.replace(/@version\\s+\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+/, '@version ' + process.env.npm_package_version); fs.writeFileSync('mBloxCall.js', f);" && git add mBloxCall.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm version patch && npm publish
